column1: A. Transactions of Oil Sector
column11: 1955 cell printed as '-- 5/' in source (nil, but with a footnote-5 marker attached to this specific cell); footnote 5/'s text ('Covers foreign private and official deposits in the Bank Melli Iran, and for 1958 and 1959, foreign direct investment in Iran, other than in the oil sector') does not obviously describe BPC compensation -- it matches the Section C 'Capital (net)' row instead, which also carries a '5/' marker on its row label. This looks like a footnote-numbering inconsistency in the original 1960 document; both instances of '5/' are transcribed exactly as printed rather than reinterpreted. Footnote 4/ in the source ('covers disinvestment by the Anglo-Iranian Oil Company (debit of $70.0 million)...and creation of an Iranian Government liability (credit of $70.0 million) by its agreement to pay compensation') appears to relate to this same BPC/nationalization compensation history, but its exact cell anchor could not be conclusively located anywhere in the printed 1953-1959 numbers (most likely a net-zero wash entry folded into an existing cell rather than a separately visible figure); quoted here for completeness rather than assigned to a specific cell to avoid fabricating a location.
